mapper.select: SELECT wo.WO_ID AS woId, wo.PLANT_CD AS plantCd, p.PLANT_NM AS plantNm, wo.WO_NO AS woNo, wo.PLAN_ID AS planId, wo.WO_DT AS woDt, wo.ITEM_CD AS itemCd, i.ITEM_NM AS itemNm, wo.WO_QTY AS woQty, wo.WORKCENTER_CD AS workcenterCd, wo.EQUIPMENT_CD AS equipmentCd, wo.WORKER_ID AS workerId, wo.PLAN_START_DTM AS planStartDtm, wo.PLAN_END_DTM AS planEndDtm, wo.ACTUAL_START_DTM AS actualStartDtm, wo.ACTUAL_END_DTM AS actualEndDtm, wo.GOOD_QTY AS goodQty, wo.DEFECT_QTY AS defectQty, wo.WO_STATUS AS woStatus, wo.PRIORITY AS priority, wo.LOT_NO AS lotNo, wo.PARENT_WO_ID AS parentWoId, wo.ORDER_NO AS orderNo, wo.DELIVERY_DT AS deliveryDt, wo.WO_RMK AS woRmk FROM PLN_WORK_ORDER wo JOIN MST_PLANT p ON p.PLANT_CD = wo.PLANT_CD LEFT JOIN MST_ITEM i ON i.ITEM_CD = wo.ITEM_CD WHERE wo.WO_ID = #{woId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLN_WORK_ORDER ( PLANT_CD, WO_NO, PLAN_ID, WO_DT, ITEM_CD, WO_QTY, WORKCENTER_CD, EQUIPMENT_CD, WORKER_ID, PLAN_START_DTM, PLAN_END_DTM, PRIORITY, LOT_NO, ORDER_NO, DELIVERY_DT, WO_STATUS, WO_RMK, REG_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{request.plantCd}, #{woNo}, #{request.planId}, #{request.woDt}, #{request.itemCd}, #{request.woQty}, #{request.workcenterCd}, #{request.equipmentCd}, #{request.workerId}, #{request.planStartDtm}, #{request.planEndDtm}, COALESCE(#{request.priority}, 5), #{request.lotNo}, #{request.orderNo}, #{request.deliveryDt}, '대기', #{request.woRmk}, #{regUserId} )
